steps.title: Compare both C minor moods
steps.content: The student's goal is to compare how Hartmann and Fournier describe C minor. A successful sentence must name both composers and include each one's specific description of that same key.

steps.title: Use the two descriptions
steps.content: A says both composers described keys but omits the moods. C includes only Hartmann's "longing" and adds unrelated information about "Don't Speak." D defines keys without comparing the composers. The effective choice pairs Hartmann's "longing" with Fournier's "obscure and sad." The answer is B.
